arts.ttl: Barcelona 'facing FFP breach' after losing huge CAS battle
arts.sum: Barcelona are at risk of breaching UEFA's Financial Fair Play rules for the 2023/24 season after losing an appeal to the Court of Arbitration for Sport (CAS) over their filings. In their annual financial report for 2023/24, Barcelona attempted to include the €267m sale of 10% of their broadcasting rights over the next 25 years as "other operating income", which would count towards their FFP situation, but UEFA insisted it should classify as "profits on disposal of tangible assets", which is not included in FFP calculations.
